summary: Comprehensive final test of MatchPulse - Full-stack Football Match Analyzer + Prediction Game. All major features working correctly. Backend: 29/31 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All critical flows verified.

minor.note: Stats are displayed from client-side count (209 matches), not critical

integration_issues.issue: Daily Bonus modal appears on every page navigation after login - works as designed but can be slightly intrusive UX
integration_issues.note: Known from previous iterations, working as designed

passed_tests: Backend: /api/health returns ok
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates new user with 1000 credits
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - authenticates existing user
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns current user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - generates token for existing email
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns null token for non-existent (security)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password - resets password with valid token
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password - rejects invalid token (400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password - rejects short password (400)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/change-password - changes password with correct current
Backend: GET /api/notifications - returns list for authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count - returns count object
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read - marks all as read
Backend: GET /api/matches - returns 209+ matches
Backend: GET /api/matches/{id} - returns single match details
Backend: GET /api/trades - returns open trades list
Backend: GET /api/trades/market-overview - returns market overview data
Backend: GET /api/trades/price-history/{id} - returns price history array
Backend: GET /api/packs - returns pack config (bronze, silver, gold)
Backend: POST /api/packs/open/bronze - opens pack (or rejects if insufficient)
Backend: GET /api/players - returns all players with 5 rarity tiers
Backend: GET /api/leaderboard - returns all-time leaderboard
Backend: GET /api/leaderboard/weekly - returns weekly leaderboard
Backend: GET /api/dashboard - returns user dashboard with stats/XP/badges
Backend: GET /api/collection - returns user collection
Backend: GET /api/badges - returns available badges
Backend: GET /api/daily-challenge - returns daily challenge
Frontend: Home page loads with 209 matches, 1,000 credits stats
Frontend: Theme toggle works (dark to light and back)
Frontend: Light theme persists across page navigation
Frontend: All pages show readable text in light mode
Frontend: Registration flow redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Login flow authenticates user
Frontend: Dashboard shows XP progress, stat cards, badges section
Frontend: Pack Store shows 5 rarity tiers in rarity guide
Frontend: Collection page shows player ownership with filters
Frontend: Trading page has Market and Price Trends tabs
Frontend: Leaderboard has All Time and Weekly tabs
Frontend: Notification bell visible in navbar when logged in
Frontend: Notification dropdown shows 'No notifications yet' for new user
Frontend: Forgot Password page renders at /forgot-password
Frontend: Profile page has Change Password form
critical_code_review_comments: Daily Bonus modal appears frequently - consider adding 'Don't show again today' option
Missing /api/matches/stats endpoint - stats shown from client-side count which works fine
test_credentials: Register via POST /api/auth/register with {username, email, password}
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0, P1, P2 features verified working. Theme toggle data-testid='theme-toggle'. Notification bell data-testid='notification-bell'. 209 matches from API-Football. Password recovery flow: forgot-password -> token -> reset-password. Change password in Profile page. Trading has Market + Price Trends tabs. All 5 rarity tiers (common/rare/epic/legendary/icon) visible in Pack Store rarity guide.

P0_theme_icons_variants.light_mode_contrast: All pages readable in light mode

P1_password_notifications.notification_bell: Visible in navbar for authenticated users

P2_enhanced_features.market_trends: Trading page has Price Trends tab with market overview
P2_enhanced_features.collection_variants: Collection shows owned count and rarity info
P2_enhanced_features.pack_rarity_guide: Shows all 5 tiers with boost info

core_features.registration: Creates user with 1000 credits, redirects to dashboard
core_features.dashboard: Shows XP progress, stat cards, badges
core_features.leaderboard: All Time and Weekly tabs working
